classification.reasoning: The document contains all necessary fields to be classified as an expense document. It includes supplier details, consumer details, transaction amount, transaction date, invoice/receipt number, tax information, payment method, and item description/line items.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: All required fields are present, confirming this is an expense document.

issues.description: The supplier tax code '0 3 1 2 6 5 0 4 3 7' contains spaces, which is not the correct format.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Receipt must display the business name of the supplier who provided goods or services

issues.description: For transportation expenses, the receipt must be a printed receipt. The provided receipt is a VAT invoice.
issues.recommendation: Please submit a printed receipt for transportation expenses.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Taxi costs will only be reimbursed against printed receipts, hand-written receipts will not be accepted

issues.description: The receipt does not include the transport company details as required for transportation expenses.
issues.recommendation: Please submit the transport company details including Name of Bus, Tax code, Address of Headquarter.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Bus tickets must show Transport company details including Name of Bus, Tax code, Address of Headquarter

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt has issues with the supplier tax code format, the type of receipt for transportation expenses, and missing transport company details. These issues need to be addressed to ensure compliance with the specified standards and policies.
